titleEn: AgriFood Signals: EIF commits $29m to Irish agrifoodtech, Aphea.Bio and Bayer team up, GLP-1 pills
titleZh: 农业食品信号：EIF向爱尔兰农业食品科技投入2900万美元，Aphea.Bio与拜耳合作，GLP-1药片获批
summaryZh: 本文汇总了2026年6月11日农业食品科技领域的重要融资、并购、合作及行业动态。亮点包括：欧洲投资基金向爱尔兰农业食品创新基金承诺2500万欧元；Aphea.Bio与拜耳合作开发生物杀虫剂；英国批准首款GLP-1减肥药片。此外还涉及昆虫蛋白、替代蛋白、精准喷洒、AI农业等领域的融资与进展。对智慧畜牧行业而言，部分内容（如精准喷洒、AI农业）有一定参考价值，但整体偏向食品科技与作物保护。
featuredReason: 本文虽以食品科技和作物保护为主，但其中精准喷洒、AI农业、工业机器人等技术与智慧畜牧的自动化、智能化方向有交叉，可启发养殖业数字化升级思路。
contentFull: AgriFood Signals: EIF commits $29m to Irish agrifoodtech, Aphea.Bio and Bayer team up, GLP-1 pills June 11, 2026 | Jennifer Marston Agtech FoodTech Aphea.Bio Image credit: Aphea.Bio AgFunderNews rounds up the most important fundings, mergers, acquisitions, closures, and industry buzz in agtech and foodtech. Funding news 🇪🇸 Samsung backs industrial robotics startup Theker in €85m round Sifted 🇫🇷 Innovafeed raises $59m, scales production, cuts R&D headcount as insect ag hits “industrialization phase” AgFunderNews 🇺🇸 Neion Bio Raises oversubscribed $23 million Series A to advance biologics manufacturing platform and expand pipeline Business Insider 🇺🇸 Leaf raises $13m Series B to bring AI to agribusiness Morningstar 🇨🇦 NS/TX Industries raises $10.5 million to scale alternative protein manufacturing platform Pulse 2.0 🇺🇸 SWARM Engineering raises $10m Series A to scale decision intelligence for agrifood and manufacturing iGrow News 🇮🇳 Manam Chocolate raises $9 million funding from Omnivore, Turner Morrison India Times 🇬🇧 Cordon Technologies raises £1M to help farmers cut pesticide use through precision spraying Tech.eu 🇳🇿 Dairy giant Lacto Japan invests in RuBisCO protein maker Leaft Foods Green Queen The team at Pymwymic. Image credit: Pymwymic M&A, IPOs & partnerships 🇳🇱 Agrifoodtech investor Pymwymic swallows Dutch bank’s food fund Impact Loop 🇦🇷 🇺🇾 NotCo’s Argentina & Uruguay Business to Be Acquired by Molinos Río de la Plata Green Queen 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 Ingredion strikes £3.7 billion ($5 billion) deal to acquire UK ingredient giant Tate & Lyle Vegconomist 🇧🇪 🇩🇪 Aphea.Bio and Bayer will co-develop bioinsecticides Revista Cultivar 🇦🇷 🇺🇾 Molinos Río de la Plata to buy NotCo units in Argentina, Uruguay Yahoo Finance Funds, grants & accelerators 🇱🇺 EIF commits €25 million to €100 million Irish agrifood innovation fund Funds for NGOs 🇺🇸 Coefficient Giving opens $10m funding call for alternative protein taste research Vegconomist People moves 🇺🇸 Jason Fullmer joins Plantible as chief operating officer LinkedIn 🇺🇸 Tyson promotes company insider to COO Food Dive 🇩🇪 Juan Martinez joins SenseUP Biosciences as co-CEO and managing director LinkedIn 🇺🇸 Pivot Bio announces additions to senior management Business Wire 🇺🇸 Mars appoints Kemal Cetin as chief digital & information officer for $36bn snacking business PR Newswire Believer Meats North Carolina factory Image credit Believer Meats Other news 🇦🇺 Pioneering ag-tech startup Goterra enters voluntary administration Smart Company 🇫🇷 Nestlé taps precision-fermented donkey milk to make whey protein without dairy allergens Green Queen 🇬🇧 First GLP-1 tablet for weight loss approved in the UK gov.uk 🇺🇸 UPSIDE Foods submits $50m stalking horse bid for Believer Meats’ US cultivated meat facility AgFunderNews Share this article Sign up for our weekly newsletter. Deep innovation, limited capital define Argentina’s agrifoodtech opportunity Agtech Developing markets Spring Innovation Fund debuts as first venture philanthropy firm dedicated to animal welfare tech Agtech Deeptech Deep innovation, limited capital define Argentina’s agrifoodtech opportunity Agtech Developing markets Spring Innovation Fund debuts as first venture philanthropy firm dedicated to animal welfare tech Agtech Deeptech
translationZh:
农业食品信号：EIF向爱尔兰农业食品科技投入2900万美元，Aphea.Bio与拜耳合作，GLP-1药片获批
2026年6月11日 | Jennifer Marston
农业科技 食品科技 Aphea.Bio
图片来源：Aphea.Bio

AgFunderNews汇总了农业科技和食品科技领域最重要的融资、并购、关闭及行业动态。

融资新闻
🇪🇸 三星支持工业机器人初创公司Theker，完成8500万欧元融资（Sifted）
🇫🇷 Innovafeed融资5900万美元，扩大生产并削减研发人员，昆虫农业进入“工业化阶段”（AgFunderNews）
🇺🇸 Neion Bio超额认购完成2300万美元A轮融资，推进生物制品制造平台并扩大管线（Business Insider）
🇺🇸 Leaf完成1300万美元B轮融资，将AI引入农业企业（Morningstar）
🇨🇦 NS/TX Industries融资1050万美元，扩大替代蛋白制造平台（Pulse 2.0）
🇺🇸 SWARM Engineering完成1000万美元A轮融资，扩大农业食品和制造业的决策智能（iGrow News）
🇮🇳 Manam Chocolate从Omnivore、Turner Morrison融资900万美元（India Times）
🇬🇧 Cordon Technologies融资100万英镑，通过精准喷洒帮助农民减少农药使用（Tech.eu）
🇳🇿 乳业巨头Lacto Japan投资RuBisCO蛋白制造商Leaft Foods（Green Queen）

Pymwymic团队。图片来源：Pymwymic

并购、IPO及合作
🇳🇱 农业食品科技投资者Pymwymic收购荷兰银行食品基金（Impact Loop）
🇦🇷🇺🇾 NotCo在阿根廷和乌拉圭的业务将被Molinos Río de la Plata收购（Green Queen）
🇺🇸🇬🇧 Ingredion以37亿英镑（50亿美元）收购英国配料巨头Tate & Lyle（Vegconomist）
🇧🇪🇩🇪 Aphea.Bio与拜耳将共同开发生物杀虫剂（Revista Cultivar）
🇦🇷🇺🇾 Molinos Río de la Plata将收购NotCo在阿根廷和乌拉圭的业务（Yahoo Finance）

基金、资助及加速器
🇱🇺 欧洲投资基金向1亿欧元的爱尔兰农业食品创新基金承诺2500万欧元（Funds for NGOs）
🇺🇸 Coefficient Giving开放1000万美元资助申请，用于替代蛋白口味研究（Vegconomist）

人事变动
🇺🇸 Jason Fullmer加入Plantible担任首席运营官（LinkedIn）
🇺🇸 泰森提拔内部人士担任首席运营官（Food Dive）
🇩🇪 Juan Martinez加入SenseUP Biosciences担任联合CEO及董事总经理（LinkedIn）
🇺🇸 Pivot Bio宣布高级管理层新增成员（Business Wire）
🇺🇸 玛氏任命Kemal Cetin为首席数字与信息官，负责360亿美元零食业务（PR Newswire）

Believer Meats北卡罗来纳工厂。图片来源：Believer Meats

其他新闻
🇦🇺 先锋农业科技初创公司Goterra进入自愿托管（Smart Company）
🇫🇷 雀巢利用精准发酵驴奶生产无乳过敏原的乳清蛋白（Green Queen）
🇬🇧 英国批准首款GLP-1减肥药片（gov.uk）
🇺🇸 UPSIDE Foods提交5000万美元“跟踪马”竞标，收购Believer Meats在美国的培育肉设施（AgFunderNews）

订阅我们的每周通讯。

深度创新、有限资本定义阿根廷的农业食品科技机遇
农业科技 新兴市场 春季
author: Jennifer Marston
